user.title: Configure Cover
user.description: Select the Shelly device that controls this cover and give it a name.

configure.title: Configure Inputs
configure.description:
Specify which Shelly input channel controls the UP movement (the DOWN channel and tilt will be derived automatically).

A URL action will be **added** to each input to keep Home Assistant state in sync when the physical button is pressed. Existing actions will not be modified.

The Home Assistant URL must be reachable from the Shelly device (local network recommended).
